# Routex — Full LLM Reference

> Multi-chain settlement cost router for the x402 payment protocol. Selects the cheapest or fastest blockchain for each AI agent micropayment — non-custodial, stateless, and BigInt-safe.

## Overview

Routex evaluates gas fees, finality times, and wallet balances across multiple blockchains in real time, then picks the optimal chain for each payment. When an AI agent receives a `402 Payment Required` response, Routex determines which chain to pay on.

Real cost impact: A $0.10 USDC payment costs ~$0.001 on Base but ~$0.01 on Polygon — 10x difference. At 10,000 payments/day, that's $90/day saved by routing to the cheapest chain.

### Core Principles

- **Non-custodial**: Never touches private keys. Uses a Signer interface.
- **Stateless**: Each route() call is independent. No mutable module-level state.
- **BigInt-safe**: All token amounts use bigint. No floating-point for money.
- **Graceful degradation**: Typed errors with context. Never silent failures.

---

## Packages

| Package | npm | Description |
|---------|-----|-------------|
| `@routexcc/core` | @routexcc/core | Router engine, types, strategies, fee oracle, balance manager |
| `@routexcc/chain-base` | @routexcc/chain-base | Base L2 adapter (EVM, viem) + shared EvmAdapter base class |
| `@routexcc/chain-polygon` | @routexcc/chain-polygon | Polygon adapter (EVM, viem, extends EvmAdapter) |
| `@routexcc/chain-stellar` | @routexcc/chain-stellar | Stellar adapter (@stellar/stellar-sdk) |
| `@routexcc/chain-solana` | @routexcc/chain-solana | Solana adapter (@solana/web3.js) |
| `@routexcc/x402` | @routexcc/x402 | x402 payment protocol middleware wrapper |
| `@routexcc/cloud` | @routexcc/cloud | Cloud SDK: fee oracle, telemetry, batch settlement |

### Dependency Graph

```
@routexcc/core (no external deps)
  ├── @routexcc/cloud (+ ws)
  ├── @routexcc/chain-base
  │   └── @routexcc/chain-polygon
  ├── @routexcc/chain-stellar
  ├── @routexcc/chain-solana
  └── @routexcc/x402
```

---

## Installation

```bash
# Core (required)
npm install @routexcc/core

# Chain adapters (install what you need)
npm install @routexcc/chain-base
npm install @routexcc/chain-polygon
npm install @routexcc/chain-stellar
npm install @routexcc/chain-solana

# x402 middleware (optional)
npm install @routexcc/x402
```

---

## Quickstart

```typescript
import { createRouter, LocalFeeOracle } from '@routexcc/core';
import { createBaseAdapter } from '@routexcc/chain-base';
import { createSolanaAdapter } from '@routexcc/chain-solana';

// 1. Configure chain adapters
const adapters = new Map([
  ['base', createBaseAdapter(viemClient)],
  ['solana', createSolanaAdapter(solanaConnection)],
]);

// 2. Create fee oracle
const feeOracle = new LocalFeeOracle({
  adapters,
  pollIntervalMs: 30_000,
  maxFeeAgeMs: 60_000,
});

// 3. Create router
const router = createRouter({
  adapters,
  feeOracle,
  strategy: 'cheapest',
  maxFeeAgeMs: 60_000,
});

// 4. Route a payment
const result = await router.route(paymentRequirement, signer);
console.log(result.chainId);  // 'base' or 'solana'
console.log(result.payload);  // Signed payload for the facilitator
```

---

## Complete Type Reference

### ChainId

```typescript
type ChainId = 'base' | 'stellar' | 'solana' | 'polygon';
```

### RouteConfig

```typescript
interface RouteConfig {
  readonly adapters: ReadonlyMap<ChainId, ChainAdapter>;
  readonly feeOracle: FeeOracle;
  readonly strategy: RoutingStrategy;
  readonly maxFeeAgeMs: number;
  readonly maxFeeUsd?: bigint;          // 6-decimal USD, e.g. 500_000n = $0.50
  readonly maxFinalityMs?: number;
  readonly excludeChains?: readonly ChainId[];
  readonly cloudApiKey?: string;        // Activates cloud features (v2)
  readonly enableBatching?: boolean;    // Activates batch settlement (v2)
}
```

### PaymentRequirement

```typescript
interface PaymentRequirement {
  readonly acceptedChains: readonly AcceptedPayment[];
}
```

### AcceptedPayment

```typescript
interface AcceptedPayment {
  readonly chainId: ChainId;
  readonly payTo: string;
  readonly amount: bigint;
  readonly token: string;
  readonly extra?: Readonly<Record<string, string>>;
}
```

### RouteResult

```typescript
interface RouteResult {
  readonly chainId: ChainId;
  readonly payload: PaymentPayload;
  readonly fee: FeeEstimate;
  readonly evaluatedOptions: readonly RouteOption[];
}
```

### PaymentPayload

```typescript
interface PaymentPayload {
  readonly chainId: ChainId;
  readonly to: string;
  readonly amount: bigint;
  readonly token: string;
  readonly data: string;
}
```

### FeeEstimate

```typescript
interface FeeEstimate {
  readonly chainId: ChainId;
  readonly feeAmount: bigint;
  readonly feeUsd: bigint;        // 6-decimal fixed point
  readonly finalityMs: number;
  readonly confidence: FeeConfidence;
  readonly timestamp: number;
}
```

### FeeConfidence

```typescript
type FeeConfidence = 'high' | 'medium' | 'low';
```

### RouteOption

```typescript
interface RouteOption {
  readonly chainId: ChainId;
  readonly payment: AcceptedPayment;
  readonly fee: FeeEstimate;
  readonly balance: bigint;
  readonly score: number;
}
```

### TokenBalance

```typescript
interface TokenBalance {
  readonly chainId: ChainId;
  readonly token: string;
  readonly balance: bigint;
  readonly timestamp: number;
}
```

### Signer

```typescript
interface Signer {
  readonly address: string;
  sign(data: Uint8Array): Promise<Uint8Array>;
  signTypedData?(typedData: Record<string, unknown>): Promise<string>;
}
```

### ChainAdapter

```typescript
interface ChainAdapter {
  readonly chainId: ChainId;
  getBalance(address: string, token: string): Promise<TokenBalance>;
  estimateFee(payment: AcceptedPayment): Promise<FeeEstimate>;
  buildPaymentPayload(payment: AcceptedPayment, signer: Signer): Promise<PaymentPayload>;
  getFinality(): number;
}
```

### FeeOracle

```typescript
interface FeeOracle {
  getFee(chainId: ChainId): Promise<FeeEstimate | undefined>;
  getAllFees(): Promise<ReadonlyMap<ChainId, FeeEstimate>>;
  start(): void;
  stop(): void;
}
```

### RoutingStrategy

```typescript
type RoutingStrategy = 'cheapest' | 'fastest' | 'balanced' | CustomStrategy;
```

### CustomStrategy

```typescript
interface CustomStrategy {
  readonly type: 'custom';
  readonly scorer: (options: readonly RouteOption[]) => readonly RouteOption[];
}
```

### RejectionReason

```typescript
interface RejectionReason {
  readonly chainId: ChainId;
  readonly reason: string;
  readonly code: RejectionCode;
}
```

### RejectionCode

```typescript
type RejectionCode =
  | 'NO_ADAPTER'
  | 'INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE'
  | 'FEE_TOO_HIGH'
  | 'FINALITY_TOO_SLOW'
  | 'CHAIN_EXCLUDED'
  | 'STALE_FEE'
  | 'FEE_UNAVAILABLE';
```

---

## Core API

### createRouter(config: RouteConfig): Router

Factory function that creates a Router instance.

```typescript
const router = createRouter({
  adapters: new Map([['base', baseAdapter]]),
  feeOracle: oracle,
  strategy: 'cheapest',
  maxFeeAgeMs: 60_000,
});
```

### Router.route(req: PaymentRequirement, signer: Signer): Promise<RouteResult>

Select the best route and build a signed payment payload.

**Throws:**
- `RouteExhaustedError` — no eligible route found
- `PaymentConstructionError` — payload construction or validation failed

```typescript
const result = await router.route(paymentRequirement, signer);
// result.chainId    — selected chain
// result.payload    — signed PaymentPayload
// result.fee        — FeeEstimate for selected chain
// result.evaluatedOptions — all RouteOptions with scores
```

### LocalFeeOracle

Polls chain adapters for fee estimates. Caches in memory with stale detection.

```typescript
const oracle = new LocalFeeOracle({
  adapters,
  pollIntervalMs: 30_000,  // default: 30s
});

oracle.start();
const fee = await oracle.getFee('base');
const allFees = await oracle.getAllFees();
oracle.stop();
```

### BalanceManager

Parallel balance queries with caching.

```typescript
const balances = new BalanceManager({
  adapters,
  cacheTtlMs: 15_000,  // default: 15s
});
const balanceMap = await balances.getBalances(walletAddress, tokenAddress);
// Map<ChainId, bigint>
```

### RouteSelector

Five-step routing pipeline (parse, filter, score, select, verify).

```typescript
const selector = new RouteSelector(routeConfig);
const result = await selector.select(paymentRequirement, signer);
```

---

## Strategy Functions

### cheapest(options: readonly RouteOption[]): readonly RouteOption[]

Score by lowest fee. Formula: `1 / (feeUsd + 0.0001)`.
Ties broken by finality time.

### fastest(options: readonly RouteOption[]): readonly RouteOption[]

Score by lowest finality time. Formula: `1 / (finalityMs + 1)`.
Ties broken by fee.

### balanced(options: readonly RouteOption[]): readonly RouteOption[]

Weighted combination. Formula: `0.6 * normFee + 0.4 * normFinality`.
Metrics normalized by max value in candidate set.

### custom(scorer): (options: readonly RouteOption[]) => readonly RouteOption[]

Wrap a user-provided scoring function.

```typescript
const router = createRouter({
  strategy: {
    type: 'custom',
    scorer: (options) => options.map(o => ({ ...o, score: myScore(o) })),
  },
  // ...
});
```

---

## Error Classes

### RoutexError

Abstract base class for all Routex errors.

### RouteExhaustedError

No eligible route found. Contains `rejections: RejectionReason[]`.

### StaleFeesError

Fee estimates older than maxFeeAgeMs. Contains `chainId`, `ageMs`, `maxAgeMs`.

### InsufficientBalanceError

Chain has insufficient balance. Contains `chainId`, `required` (bigint), `available` (bigint).

### PaymentConstructionError

Payload construction failed. Contains `chainId`, `phase`, `detail` (sanitized).

---

## Chain Adapters

### Base (`@routexcc/chain-base`)

EVM adapter using viem. Finality: ~2000ms. Chain IDs: 8453 (mainnet), 84532 (testnet).

```typescript
import { createBaseAdapter } from '@routexcc/chain-base';
import { createPublicClient, http } from 'viem';
import { base } from 'viem/chains';

const client = createPublicClient({ chain: base, transport: http(rpcUrl) });
const adapter = createBaseAdapter(client);
// Testnet: createBaseAdapter(client, { testnet: true })
```

Exports: `createBaseAdapter`, `EvmAdapter` (shared base class).

### Polygon (`@routexcc/chain-polygon`)

EVM adapter extending EvmAdapter. Finality: ~2000ms. Chain IDs: 137 (mainnet), 80002 (testnet).

```typescript
import { createPolygonAdapter } from '@routexcc/chain-polygon';
const adapter = createPolygonAdapter(viemClient);
```

### Stellar (`@routexcc/chain-stellar`)

Stellar SDK adapter. Finality: ~5000ms. Uses USDC trustlines.

```typescript
import { createStellarAdapter } from '@routexcc/chain-stellar';
const adapter = createStellarAdapter(stellarRpcClient, {
  usdcIssuer: 'GA5ZSEJYB37JRC5AVCIA5MOP4RHTM335X2KGX3IHOJAPP5RE34K4KZVN',
});
```

### Solana (`@routexcc/chain-solana`)

Solana web3.js adapter. Finality: ~400ms. Uses SPL USDC.

```typescript
import { createSolanaAdapter } from '@routexcc/chain-solana';
const adapter = createSolanaAdapter(solanaRpcClient, {
  usdcMint: 'EPjFWdd5AufqSSqeM2qN1xzybapC8G4wEGGkZwyTDt1v',
});
```

---

## x402 Middleware

```typescript
import { routexMiddleware } from '@routexcc/x402';

const middleware = routexMiddleware({
  routeConfig: { adapters, feeOracle, strategy: 'cheapest', maxFeeAgeMs: 60_000 },
  signer: mySigner,
  onRouteSelected: (result) => console.log(`Paying via ${result.chainId}`),
  onRouteFailed: (error) => console.error('Routing failed:', error),
});

// When you get a 402 response:
const parsed = middleware.parseResponse(402, responseBody);
if (parsed) {
  const { payload, chainId } = await middleware.handlePaymentRequired(parsed);
}
```

---

## Cloud SDK (`@routexcc/cloud`)

### CloudFeeOracle

WebSocket-based fee oracle with REST fallback and local oracle degradation.

```typescript
import { CloudFeeOracle } from '@routexcc/cloud';
import { LocalFeeOracle } from '@routexcc/core';

const oracle = CloudFeeOracle({
  apiKey: 'rtx_your_key',
  fallback: new LocalFeeOracle(localConfig),
  // endpoint?: string (default: https://oracle.routex.dev)
  // fallbackTimeoutMs?: number (default: 5000)
  // wsReconnectMaxMs?: number (default: 30000)
  // restPollIntervalMs?: number (default: 10000)
});
oracle.start();
```

Behavior: WebSocket → REST polling → local fallback. Auto-recovers.

### TelemetryReporter

Event buffering and HTTP batch reporting. Allowlisted fields only.

```typescript
import { TelemetryReporter } from '@routexcc/cloud';

const reporter = TelemetryReporter({
  apiKey: 'rtx_your_key',
  // bufferSize?: number (default: 10)
  // flushIntervalMs?: number (default: 5000)
});
reporter.report(routeResult);  // fire-and-forget
await reporter.flush();        // flush now
await reporter.stop();         // stop and flush
```

Telemetry fields: chainId, amount, feeUsd, savingsUsd, timestamp.

### BatchClient

Batch intent submission for settlement (v2 feature).

### v2 Auto-Activation

Set `cloudApiKey` in `RouteConfig` to automatically:
- Wrap feeOracle with CloudFeeOracle
- Create TelemetryReporter (fires after each route)
- Fall back silently if @routexcc/cloud is not installed

---

## Supported Chains

| Chain    | Adapter Package           | Finality | Typical Fee         | Technology   |
|----------|---------------------------|----------|---------------------|-------------- |
| Base     | @routexcc/chain-base      | ~2s      | $0.0005-$0.005      | EVM (viem)   |
| Polygon  | @routexcc/chain-polygon   | ~2s      | $0.005-$0.05        | EVM (viem)   |
| Stellar  | @routexcc/chain-stellar   | ~5s      | $0.00001-$0.0001    | Stellar SDK  |
| Solana   | @routexcc/chain-solana    | ~400ms   | $0.0005-$0.005      | web3.js      |

---

## Security Invariants

| ID     | Invariant                                              |
|--------|--------------------------------------------------------|
| INV-1  | No private key access (Signer interface)               |
| INV-2  | Recipient matches 402 payTo address                    |
| INV-3  | Amount matches 402 requirement (BigInt)                |
| INV-4  | Chain ID matches selected adapter                      |
| INV-5  | No silent failure (RouteExhaustedError with rejections)|
| INV-6  | Stale fees rejected (maxFeeAgeMs)                      |
| INV-7  | BigInt-only token arithmetic                           |
| INV-8  | No credentials in error messages                       |
| INV-9  | Stateless routing                                      |
| INV-10 | Graceful degradation (caller can always fall back)     |

---

## Configuration Reference

### RouteConfig Options

| Option | Type | Required | Description |
|--------|------|----------|-------------|
| adapters | Map<ChainId, ChainAdapter> | Yes | Chain adapters to use |
| feeOracle | FeeOracle | Yes | Fee estimation source |
| strategy | RoutingStrategy | Yes | 'cheapest' / 'fastest' / 'balanced' / CustomStrategy |
| maxFeeAgeMs | number | Yes | Reject fees older than this (ms) |
| maxFeeUsd | bigint | No | Max fee in USD (6-decimal) |
| maxFinalityMs | number | No | Max finality time (ms) |
| excludeChains | ChainId[] | No | Chains to skip |
| cloudApiKey | string | No | Activates cloud features |
| enableBatching | boolean | No | Activates batch settlement |

### LocalFeeOracle Options

| Option | Type | Default | Description |
|--------|------|---------|-------------|
| adapters | Map<ChainId, ChainAdapter> | — | Chain adapters to poll |
| pollIntervalMs | number | 30000 | Polling interval (ms) |

### BalanceManager Options

| Option | Type | Default | Description |
|--------|------|---------|-------------|
| adapters | Map<ChainId, ChainAdapter> | — | Chain adapters |
| cacheTtlMs | number | 15000 | Cache TTL (ms) |

---

## Error Handling

```typescript
import {
  RouteExhaustedError,
  StaleFeesError,
  InsufficientBalanceError,
  PaymentConstructionError,
} from '@routexcc/core';

try {
  const result = await router.route(requirement, signer);
} catch (error) {
  if (error instanceof RouteExhaustedError) {
    console.log(error.rejections); // Per-chain rejection reasons
  }
  if (error instanceof InsufficientBalanceError) {
    console.log(error.chainId, error.required, error.available);
  }
  if (error instanceof StaleFeesError) {
    console.log(error.chainId, error.ageMs, error.maxAgeMs);
  }
}
```

---

## Requirements

- Node.js >= 20
- TypeScript >= 5.7 (strict mode)
- Dual CJS/ESM output (.cjs/.mjs)

MIT
